creator: gebhart@secnetix.de
text:
I had the same problem for months not being able to track down the problem.
I can confirm:

 pkg delete libgnomeui

immediately solved my problem and fortunately libgnomeui wasn't needed by any other ports.
Having GSTREAMER in wx* enabled is no problem. I have that working on another machine with a working audacity AND also with tuxguitar installed.
